query:
-- Fix 13Number services: monthlyCost was incorrectly set to $900 from pricebook
-- These are per-minute usage charges on the Vocus/BroadSoft platform
-- Correct wholesale cost = monthlyRevenue * (0.21/0.30) = 70% of retail
-- Also correct provider from SasBoss to Vocus

UPDATE services
SET 
  monthlyCost = ROUND(CAST(monthlyRevenue AS DECIMAL(10,4)) * 0.7, 4),
  provider = 'Vocus',
  costSource = 'invoice_derived',
  billingPlatform = 'Datagate',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName = '13Number' 
  AND monthlyCost = 900.00
  AND costSource = 'access4_diamond_pricebook_excel';

-- Verify the fix
SELECT externalId, planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, 
       ROUND(monthlyCost / NULLIF(monthlyRevenue, 0) * 100, 1) as marginPct,
       provider, costSource
FROM services
WHERE planName = '13Number'
ORDER BY monthlyRevenue ASC;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Fix 13Number services: monthlyCost was incorrectly set to $900 from pricebook
-- These are per-minute usage charges on the Vocus/BroadSoft platform
-- Correct wholesale cost = monthlyRevenue * (0.21/0.30) = 70% of retail
-- Also correct provider from SasBoss to Vocus

UPDATE services
SET 
  monthlyCost = ROUND(CAST(monthlyRevenue AS DECIMAL(10,4)) * 0.7, 4),
  provider = 'Vocus',
  costSource = 'invoice_derived',
  billingPlatform = 'Datagate',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName = '13Number' 
  AND monthlyCost = 900.00
  AND costSource = 'access4_diamond_pricebook_excel';

-- Verify the fix
SELECT externalId, planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, 
       ROUND(monthlyCost / NULLIF(monthlyRevenue, 0) * 100, 1) as marginPct,
       provider, costSource
FROM services
WHERE planName = '13Number'
ORDER BY monthlyRevenue ASC;
